A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After identifying Indianapolis businesses from the business collection, the agent computed per-business average ratings (query_db var_function-call-2025848882773634410) and then incorrectly averaged those averages in Python (execute_python var_function-call-18008588926842251060) instead of calculating the overall average across all reviews, leading to the wrong final result.
B. Failure modes encountered:

FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes

The agent filtered businesses with the regex "Indianapolis, IN" on the business.description field (call function-call-1204597856833948956), which missed other Indianapolis entries (e.g., "Indianapolis, Indiana"), leading to averaging ratings over only five businesses (call function-call-5584138813954844027) and an inflated result of 3.86 instead of the true 3.5470.
